channel.title: PR Primespot – U.S. Breaking News, Politics and Business
channel.description: Stay updated with U.S. breaking news, politics, business, tech, and investigations, with real-time coverage, trusted analysis, and essential daily insights

item.title: Rocket Lab to Acquire Iridium in $8B Deal, Creating New Rival to SpaceX in Satellite Communications
item.description:
Rocket Lab has agreed to acquire satellite communications company Iridium in an $8 billion deal, combining launch capabilities with global satellite services to challenge SpaceX’s dominance in the sector
Read the full article: https://www.prprimespot.com/investment/rocket-lab-iridium-acquisition-8-billion-deal-2026
